supersedes.relationship: v11 extends v10 with current-chat source ingestion

completed_this_pass.scope: Three user-visible messages available in active context plus a separately labelled derived timeline were preserved.
Transcript identity, exclusions, controls and exact export blocker are registered.
Five requirements were mapped to artifacts, evidence, states, rollback and reasons without automatic canonical promotion.
Raw source, derived summary, requirement candidates, tracker and continuation route are separated and linked.

new_exact_gate.next_action: Create a ChatGPT shared-conversation link or provide a fresh ChatGPT data export containing this conversation; then run byte-exact message-tree reconciliation.

continuation_instruction: Read canonical startup files, then v11 tracker, current-chat manifest, requirement candidates and transcript. Resume safe work from repository truth. Reconcile an exact ChatGPT export additively when available.
